news.headline: CoreWeave to reduce IPO size to $1.5B
ECB's de Guindos: It is very difficult to say what ECB will do in April.
ECB's de Guindos: We need to be very prudent with policy.
ECB's de Guindos: Main impact of tariffs on growth and short lived impact on inflation.
ECB's de Guindos: For growth, a trade war is extremely detrimental.
ECB's de Guindos: There is high uncertainty on growth, largely from trade.
Circle and international exchange will partner to explore the use of USDC stablecoin in an upcoming collaboration.
Understance opens 4th Canadian retail location in Burnaby, making solution-based lingerie more accessible.
news.summary: A new Understance boutique is set to open in Burnaby, British Columbia tomorrow at Unit #2150, 4700 Kingsway St. This expansion follows successful store openings in Calgary and Toronto last year. The brand aims to make solution-based lingerie more widely available in Canada. Understance focuses on offering high-quality, affordable, and thoughtful lingerie options. The brand is expanding its reach to cater to a wider audience.

news.headline: Petco partners with Uber Eats for nationwide delivery; all US locations on platform, offering pet essentials.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Uber Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: UBER) and Petco Health and Wellness Company, Inc. (Nasdaq: WOOF) have unveiled a partnership offering Petco's range of pet essentials on the Uber Eats platform. This collaboration enables pet parents to conveniently access necessary items. All Petco stores in the contiguous United States are now accessible on Uber Eats, allowing customers to order pet food, toys, treats, and more for immediate or scheduled delivery.

news.headline: P&G to discuss Q3 earnings results on April 24, 2025 at 8:30 a.m. ET. Webcast on www.pginvestor.com.
news.summary: The Procter & Gamble Company is set to discuss its third-quarter earnings results on April 24, 2025, starting at 8:30 a.m. ET. The webcast, available at www.pginvestor.com, can be accessed by media and investors. Procter & Gamble, listed on NYSE as PG, is known for its leading brands like Always, Ambi Pur, and Ariel. With a strong portfolio, P&G caters to global consumers with trusted and quality products. The live audio webcast will also offer a replay option for those unable to join during the initial broadcast.

news.headline: Bojangles introduces limited-time Strawberry Cobbler with sweet icing on scratch-made biscuit, part of their seasonal cobbler lineup.
news.summary: Charlotte-based fast-food chain Bojangles has recently launched a limited-time treat, the Strawberry Cobbler, to infuse a burst of berry flavor this season. This new addition to their cobbler lineup consists of a scratch-made buttermilk biscuit filled with warm strawberry topping and finished off with a drizzle of sweet icing. The Strawberry Cobbler is designed to offer a blend of sweetness and Southern comfort, showcasing Bojangles’ commitment to providing unique seasonal offerings. This debut signifies the chain’s focus on diversifying its menu in 2025, with the Strawberry Cobbler being a standout item in their lineup.

news.headline: Jared Jewelers unveils Vera Wang VOW bridal collection with 38 styles, emphasizing modern, minimalistic design and high-quality diamonds.
news.summary: In Akron, Ohio, Jared Jewelers, a luxury brand under Signet Jewelers, has introduced the Vera Wang VOW bridal collection. Developed in collaboration with fashion icon Vera Wang, this new line showcases elegant and contemporary designs for bridal and anniversary rings. Available exclusively at Jared Jewelers, Vera Wang VOW presents 38 ring styles, showcasing top-notch diamonds set in a sleek and minimalist manner. This collection offers high-quality pieces that cater to modern tastes in bridal jewelry.

news.headline: NielsenIQ report discusses global trends in private label vs. branded products, offering insights for retailers & CPG manufacturers.
news.summary: NielsenIQ unveiled a new report titled "Finding Harmony on the Shelf: 2025 Global Outlook on Private Label & Branded Products," focusing on evolving global consumer preferences for private label versus branded products. The report delves into factors influencing these trends worldwide, providing valuable insights for retailers and CPG manufacturers seeking to engage consumers in a rapidly changing economic landscape. This analysis offers guidance on tailoring strategies to meet consumer demands effectively.

news.headline: Sprouts Farmers Market partners with 8 female athletes in new NIL deals, expanding PowHERed program.
news.summary: In Phoenix, Sprouts has continued its dedication to empowering female college athletes through its PowHERed by Sprouts program by securing eight new individual Name, Image, and Likeness (NIL) agreements.

news.headline: ECB's de Guindos: We believe that we'll converge towards target in coming quarters on a stable basis.
ECB's de Guindos: I am optimistic on inflation, including services.
Platform Science and MapUp team up to enhance toll management for fleets. MapUp's toll management products integrated with Platform Science's telematics capabilities.
news.summary: In San Diego, Platform Science, a prominent transportation application platform, has revealed a new collaboration with MapUp, a top provider of software-defined fuel and toll solutions. Through this partnership, MapUp's toll management products like TollGuru, TollTally, and TollMatch have been integrated with Platform Science's advanced telematics features. This integration aims to provide fleet operators with a comprehensive solution to enhance efficiency and reduce costs related to fuel and toll expenses.

news.headline: ECB's de Guindos: We are optimistic with regard to inflation.

Interlink Electronics reported financial results for Q4 2024: Revenue $2.98m, down 15.6%; Net loss $413k, up 7.8%. Expanding product offerings in wearables and smart textiles. Strengthened leadership team and facility in Silicon Valley. Loss from operations at $510k.
news.summary: Interlink Electronics, Inc. reported financial results for the quarter and year ended December 31, 2024. In the fourth quarter of 2024, the company acquired UK-based Conductive Transfers Limited, received a $400,000 grant for gas sensor manufacturing, received a $150,000 grant from NASA for air quality monitoring, unveiled a new sensor family at CES 2025, and made key leadership appointments. The company's revenue for the quarter was $2.986 million, down 15.6% from the previous year. Gross profit was $1.183 million, down 18.5%, and net loss was $413,000, down 7.8%. For the year, revenue was $11.679 million, down 16.2% from the previous year. Gross profit was $4.846 million, down 26.1%, and net loss was $1.984 million, down 418.0%. The company's CEO highlighted growth in sensor technologies and strategic positioning for organic growth in 2025.

news.headline: GCM Grosvenor appoints Martin Laguerre as Co-Head of Global Diversified Private Equity. Laguerre brings 25 years of investment expertise.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, GCM Grosvenor, a global provider of alternative asset management solutions, revealed the appointment of Martin Laguerre as the Co-Head of Global Diversified Private Equity. Laguerre, boasting 25 years of investment expertise encompassing private equity, capital solutions, and infrastructure, has demonstrated a solid history of executing direct deals, managing portfolios, and allocating capital worldwide. He will work collaboratively with Bernard Yancovich, who heads the firm’s diversified private equity domain.

news.headline: Altus Group's 2025 Canadian Cost Guide analyzes real estate development costs in major cities, covering all asset classes.
news.summary: A recent report analyzed the yearly costs of real estate development and infrastructure construction in key Canadian urban centers. The study covered all types of assets and revealed significant figures on expenses in these cities.

news.headline: First patient enrolled in Mainz Biomed's eAArly DETECT 2 study, focusing on early detection of disease.
Actelis Networks gets new order from major North American railway for Positive Train Control, reaffirming trust in its solutions.
news.summary: A recent purchase showcases Actelis' significance in safeguarding rail safety systems, underlining the confidence of essential transportation infrastructure operators in its networking solutions. The order reaffirms Actelis' crucial involvement in maintaining critical rail safety, demonstrating the reliability and trustworthiness of its platforms. This further solidifies Actelis' position as a key player in ensuring the safety and efficiency of rail operations.

news.headline: INBS expands in Spain and Andorra, eyes $448M drug testing market by 2030.
news.summary: INBS is positioned to take advantage of the expanding market for drug testing in Spain, which is predicted to reach $448 million by the year 2030.

news.headline: EnWave and BioTechnique sign master service agreement for REV™ dehydration tech, aiming to replace lyophilization in pharma.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on March 27, 2025, EnWave Corporation (TSX-V:ENW | FSE:E4U) disclosed that they have entered a master service agreement with BioTechnique, a US-based pharmaceutical contract manufacturing service provider. The Agreement defines the conditions under which BioTechnique will assess EnWave's Radiant Energy Vacuum (“REV™”) dehydration technology as an alternative to lyophilization in the biopharmaceutical sector.

news.headline: Kartoon Studios to release Q4 2024 results on March 31 pre-market. CEO and CFO to host video Q&A with investor.
news.summary: CEO Andy Heyward and CFO Brian Parisi are scheduled to participate in a video Q&A session with prominent investor Bryce McNallie of the popular McNallie Money Podcast. This event aims to provide insights and updates to investors and the public. The session will offer an opportunity for viewers to engage with the company's key figures and gain valuable information about their strategies and performance. Stay tuned for more details on this interactive discussion, which is anticipated to take place in the near future.

news.headline: Femasys reports financial results for 2024, introduces FemBloc® in Europe, and signs distribution partnerships in Spain.
news.summary: A firm, Femasys Inc. (NASDAQ: FEMY), known for its innovative solutions in women's health globally, unveiled its fiscal year outcomes for 2024 and shared a corporate update. The company has broadened its commercial offerings by gaining approval for its FemBloc® permanent birth control delivery system in Europe. Moreover, strategic partnerships have been established for distribution in Spain. The announcement was made on March 27, 2025, from Atlanta. Femasys Inc. is recognized for its accessible and groundbreaking in-office therapeutic and diagnostic products tailored to meet substantial unmet needs in women's health.

news.headline: Nevada Canyon Gold Corp. announces additional drill results from 2024 RC drill program on Lapon Canyon Project in Nevada.
news.summary: Reno, NV - March 27, 2025 - Nevada Canyon Gold Corp. (OTCQX: NGLD) shared positive news about the Lapon Canyon Project, revealing further drill findings from the 2024 reverse circulation (“RC”) drill venture. Situated in the renowned Walker Lane gold trend of Nevada, the Project is a royalty and exploration stream owned by Nevada Canyon. This update marks a significant advancement for the Company, indicating promising developments from the ongoing drilling activities on the Project. Investors and stakeholders can anticipate more growth and opportunities as the exploration progresses.

news.headline: German Chancellor Scholz: Stopping sanctions at this time would be a mistake.
German Chancellor Scholz: We can see that Russia is not really interested in peace.
Effective Fed Funds Rate 4.33% March 26 vs 4.33% March 25.
Winnebago Stock Climbs On Q2 Earnings Beat, But FY25 Forecast Slashed On Market Headwinds
ParaZero is planning to acquire a company specializing in counter-drone systems and autonomous drone technologies.(Character count: 111)
news.summary: ParaZero is considering acquiring a company that specializes in advanced space technologies and deep-space navigation. This move would add valuable expertise to ParaZero's innovation portfolio. The acquisition aims to enhance the company's capabilities in these areas.

news.headline: Financial advisor Austin Greer, CRPS ® joins LPL Financial's Linsco channel, launches Oxford Oaks Capital, serving $600M assets.
news.summary: LPL Financial LLC recently revealed that financial advisor Austin Greer, CRPS ®, has become part of LPL’s employee advisor channel, Linsco by LPL Financial, to establish Oxford Oaks Capital of LPL Financial. Coming from UBS, Greer brings with him a substantial portfolio, managing around $600 million in advisory, brokerage, and retirement plan assets*.

news.headline: Liberty Defense partners with Point Security to introduce HEXWAVE to US aviation sector, backed by 30 years of experience.
news.summary: In an announcement made on March 27, 2025, Liberty Defense Holdings Ltd. revealed a strategic non-exclusive distribution partnership with Point Security Inc., headquartered in Lexington, North Carolina. Liberty, a prominent technology firm specializing in AI-driven advanced detection systems for hidden non-metallic and metallic threats, disclosed its plans to introduce the HEXWAVE™ solution to airports across the United States. The agreement marks a significant milestone for Liberty as it aims to expand its reach in the US market. Point Security, boasting three decades of expertise in vending, leasing, and maintaining checkpoint security apparatus, will play a vital role in this initiative. Liberty Defense Holdings Ltd. is traded on the TSXV under SCAN, the OTCQB under LDDFF, and the FRANKFURT market under LD2A.

news.headline: Franklin Buchanan of Post Up Careers earns silver in inaugural Momentum Awards as top career coach - AIKEN, S.C., March 27, 2025.
news.summary: Franklin Buchanan, a Certified Professional Career Coach based in Aiken, South Carolina, was recently honored as a silver winner in the "Top Career Coach" category at the inaugural Momentum Awards held on March 27, 2025. This recognition places him among global leaders in providing personalized expertise to job seekers. Buchanan’s achievement underscores his dedication to assisting individuals in navigating the job market, emphasizing his success in this competitive field.

news.headline: JTEC Energy recognized on TIME's America's Top GreenTech Companies 2025 list, presented by Statista Inc.
news.summary: In Atlanta on March 27, 2025, the cleantech hydrogen energy corporation JTEC Energy was recognized as one of TIME's Top GreenTech Companies 2025. This accolade, given by TIME and Statista Inc., a primary statistics portal and industry ranking provider, highlights JTEC Energy's commitment to sustainability and innovation in the sector.

news.headline: NYSE provides pre-market update; ICE to explore digital asset use with Circle. Kristen Scholer delivers daily insights on March 27, 2025.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) released its daily pre-market update from the NYSE Trading Floor. Investors can gain valuable market insights by accessing the NYSE Pre-market update before trading commences. Kristen Scholer presented the pre-market update on that day, offering crucial information for traders.

news.headline: UK PM Starmer: Now is not the time for lifting sanctions.

CEO Paolo Ardoino announces the start of 'stablecoin multiverse' era, with an expected user count of 1 billion soon. Concerns over regulation and challenges posed by growing number of stablecoins emerge. Investigations into Tether's use for criminal activities underway in the US.
news.summary: Paolo Ardoino, CEO of Tether, stated that the stablecoin industry has entered a new phase, with multiple stablecoins being launched to meet increasing global demand. Ardoino mentioned that Tether currently has 400 million users worldwide and expects that number to reach one billion soon, emphasizing the company's focus on grassroots adoption. However, Slava Demchuk, CEO of AMLBot, disagreed with the idea that there are hundreds of stablecoins being launched by companies and governments, citing the complex regulatory requirements involved in creating stablecoins, especially under the EU's MiCA framework. Demchuk warned about the risks posed by regulatory disparities across jurisdictions and the potential exodus of companies to less regulated markets. Additionally, concerns were raised about Tether's reputation and investigations in the US related to sanctions compliance and Anti-Money Laundering. Despite Ardoino's positive outlook, Vasily Vidmanov of PureFi believes that Tether may face challenges achieving projected growth due to regulatory issues, necessitating adaptation and new approaches to decentralization. The article highlights the ongoing developments and debates in the stablecoin industry, underscoring the complex regulatory landscape and the need for industry players to navigate these challenges.

news.headline: Veritable Distillery launches Ship's Bell Bourbon & Southwick's American Gin, reviving old techniques in Connecticut.
news.summary: A spirits company in Connecticut, Veritable Distillery, is bringing back ancient methods with the debut of their first two products: Ship's Bell Bourbon and Southwick's American Gin. This Stonington-based company is focused on reviving traditional techniques. The launch took place on March 27, 2025.

news.headline: Earthbar and EVERY launch Protein Mocha Latte and Protein Matcha Latte in select California locations, with 12-13 grams of protein per serving.
news.summary: Today, in select California Earthbar locations, customers can now enjoy a new protein boost option. Teaming up with The EVERY Company, Earthbar introduces two Limited Time Offer drinks: the Protein Mocha Latte and Protein Matcha Latte. These lattes boast 12 to 13 grams of protein per serving, maintaining great taste and texture. The innovative protein-boost formula comes from EVERY, offering a unique way for patrons to power up their day.

news.headline: Ken Seipel has been elected as Chairman of the Board at Citi Trends, effective April 2, 2025. CEO and Board member.
news.summary: In Savannah, Georgia, Citi Trends, Inc. (NASDAQ: CTRN), a prominent off-price value retailer catering to African American families in the US, disclosed that Kenneth Seipel, the current Chief Executive Officer, has been appointed as the Chairman of the Board starting from April 2, 2025. The decision was made unanimously by the Board of Directors.

news.headline: POINTek, Inc. launches Multifunctional AAWG brick, offering high performance and optical module services.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, POINTek, Inc., headquartered in San Francisco and Seoul, South Korea, a renowned global company specializing in high-performance Athermal AWGs (AAWGs) and optical module packaging services, unveiled its latest product. The new Multifunctional AAWG brick has been introduced to provide enhanced access to various functions.

news.headline: Global Prison Management Systems market valued at $1.2 billion in 2024, set to reach $1.5 billion by 2030, growing at 3.7% CAGR fueled by focus on prisoner rights and welfare. Reported by ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: Dublin - A report on Prison Management Systems has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The global market for these systems was worth US$1.2 billion in 2024 and is expected to reach US$1.5 billion by 2030, with a projected growth rate of 3.7% from 2024 to 2030. The report offers a detailed examination of market trends, drivers, and predictions to assist in making strategic business choices. The increasing adoption of Prison Management Systems is a key highlight of the analysis provided.

news.headline: Minesto's ocean energy tech partners with SKF in global campaign. "The Faroe Islands Space Program" highlights their work.
news.summary: In Gothenburg, Sweden on March 27, 2025, Minesto, a top ocean energy developer, has been chosen by SKF, a prominent bearing manufacturer, to participate in a major global marketing initiative. This collaboration is part of the extensive international brand campaign titled "The Faroe Islands Space Program," which is set to showcase innovative technologies and solutions.

news.headline: French Blockchain Group's Bitcoin account now holds $54 million, placing it in top 30 corporate Bitcoin holders.
news.summary: The recent purchase of BTC by the company has elevated it to one of the top 30 corporate holders of Bitcoin worldwide. This exclusive list is largely dominated by Michael Saylor's Strategy.

news.headline: Actinium Pharma unveils ATNM-400, achieving 99.8% tumor growth inhibition with single dose in preclinical models.
news.summary: In preclinical prostate cancer models, a remarkable 99.8% inhibition of tumor growth was observed after administering a single dose of ATNM-400. The drug was found to accumulate in tumors for a duration of up to 144 hours, while displaying minimal uptake in healthy tissues within the prostate cancer xenograft model. The preliminary preclinical data for ATNM-400 showcases its exceptional efficacy and targeted approach in combatting prostate cancer progression.

news.headline: Linearis introduces new high-throughput metabolomics platform post modernization with cutting-edge equipment for biomarker analysis.
news.summary: Quebec City witnessed the opening of Linearis' newly renovated laboratory on March 27, 2025. Equipped with state-of-the-art technology, the facility now boasts advanced equipment that enables swift and accurate biomarker analysis. This modernization effort has resulted in the establishment of a high-throughput metabolomics platform, integrating cutting-edge tools for efficient processing.

news.headline: Bob Funk, Jr. promoted to President of Express Employment International, leading Sales and Marketing teams.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, in Oklahoma City, Express Employment International promoted Bob Funk, Jr., to President. In his new role, Funk Jr. will oversee the Sales and Marketing teams, in addition to his current responsibilities. This change is effective immediately and signifies a key leadership shift within the company.
